top_signals.title: EU Temporarily Suspends Fertilizer Duties Amidst Hormuz Crisis
top_signals.summary: The EU will temporarily lift customs duties on key nitrogen-based fertilizers such as urea and ammonia for one year to mitigate the knock-on effects of the Iran war, the Council of the EU said on Friday.Global fertiliser prices have jumped following the near total closure of the Strait of Hormuz…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
